data.name: Dashboard.SystemInfo.Storage.DiskInfo
data.value: {0} GB used of {1} GB ({2} GB free)

data.name: Features.Gaming.Description
data.value: Game-related display, input, and recording settings

data.name: Dashboard.Actions.Discord.Description
data.value: Join my Discord community to... get support or play games with me

data.name: Dashboard.Actions.GitHub.Description
data.value: Explore, review, and contribute to my project through GitHub

data.name: Dashboard.Actions.SupportMe.Description
data.value: Star the repo on GitHub, share it with friends, or donate every bit helps this project grow!

data.name: Settings.LanguageChanged.Description
data.value: You need to restart the application to apply the new language.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.ThemeSelector.Description
data.value: Select your preferred theme for the app.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.SvcHostSplit.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets the Service Host split threshold to match total system RAM, forcing Windows to isolate services into separate processes for improved stability.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.InstallOptimizerDuckPowerPlan.Error.DetectActivePlanFailed
data.value: Failed to detect the current active power plan.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.InstallOptimizerDuckPowerPlan.Error.ImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import optimizerDuck's power plan.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.InstallOptimizerDuckPowerPlan.Error.ActivateFailed
data.value: Failed to activate optimizerDuck's power plan.

data.name: Optimizer.UI.Risk.Help
data.value: This value reflects the level of intervention and the safety of the optimization process. Please exercise caution and consider carefully before applying any optimization.

data.name: Optimizer.UI.Tags.Help
data.value: These tags indicate which parts of the system the optimization will affect.

data.name: Service.Service.Error.UpdateRegistryForStartupTypeFailed
data.value: Failed to update registry for startup type

data.name: OptimizationResultDialog.Description
data.value: Some steps didn't complete successfully. You can retry only the failed steps.

data.name: Settings.Optimize.ShellTimeout.Description
data.value: Timeout for each shell command execution (milliseconds).

data.name: Settings.Advanced.ClearResources.Description
data.value: Delete all files downloaded during the optimization process.

data.name: Settings.Advanced.ClearRevertDatas.Description
data.value: Clear all rollback data from optimizations.

data.name: Settings.Advanced.OpenRootDir.Description
data.value: Open the application's root directory, where all necessary files are stored.

data.name: Dialog.AreYouSure.Title
data.value: Do you really want to proceed?

data.name: Settings.ClearResources.Description
data.value: You are about to delete all resources downloaded or generated during the optimization process. Please note that this action is permanent and cannot be undone, so make sure you are certain before proceeding.

data.name: Settings.ClearRevertData.Description
data.value: You are about to delete all rollback data generated after the optimization process. This means you will no longer be able to restore the pre-optimization state, so please think carefully before confirming.

data.name: ProcessingOptimizationDialog.Warning.DontCloseAppOrRestart
data.value: Please don't close the app or restart while changes are being applied or reverted.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.DisableBackgroundApps.ShortDescription
data.value: Prevents inactive applications from running in the background to free up RAM and reduce CPU overhead.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.ProcessPriority.ShortDescription
data.value: Allocates more CPU resources to the application you are currently using for a faster, more responsive experience.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.GameTaskScheduling.ShortDescription
data.value: Assigns high priority to gaming workloads to ensure consistent frames per second (FPS) and smoother gameplay.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.MultimediaResponsiveness.ShortDescription
data.value: Prioritizes system resources for multimedia and gaming by reducing background CPU reservation and disabling network throttling for lower latency.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.KeyboardLatencyOptimization.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets the fastest keyboard repeat delay and repeat rate for more responsive typing and repeated key presses.

data.name: Optimizer.Performance.DisableAccessibilityKeyboardHotkeys.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables Sticky Keys, Filter Keys, and Toggle Keys keyboard shortcuts to prevent accidental pop-ups during gaming and typing.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.DisableHibernate.ShortDescription
data.value: Turns off hibernation to reclaim disk space used by the hiberfil.sys file.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.DisableFastStartup.ShortDescription
data.value: Turns off Fast Startup to ensure a full shutdown and cleaner hardware initialization on boot.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.DisableUSBPowerSaving.ShortDescription
data.value: Prevents Windows from powering down USB ports, eliminating wake-up delays for mice, keyboards, and other peripherals.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.InstallOptimizerDuckPowerPlan.ShortDescription
data.value: Installs a custom performance-focused power plan to ensure your system always runs at maximum speed.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.DisablePowerSaving.ShortDescription
data.value: Prevents Windows from limiting CPU performance (Power Throttling) to maintain peak power for active tasks.

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.OptimizeMultimediaProfile.ShortDescription
data.value: Configures the multimedia system profile to prioritize performance and disable lazy mode for better responsiveness.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableUAC.ShortDescription
data.value: Turns off User Account Control (UAC) windows that ask for permission when running apps as administrator.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableTelemetry.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables Windows telemetry and usage tracking services to enhance your personal privacy and reduce background activity.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableErrorReporting.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables Windows Error Reporting and Program Compatibility Assistant services.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableAdvertisingAndSuggestions.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables personalized ads, Windows consumer features, and system suggestions.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableActivityHistory.ShortDescription
data.value: Prevents Windows from collecting and syncing your activity history.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableLocationAndSensors.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables location tracking, system sensors, and offline maps updates.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableAutoLogger.ShortDescription
data.value: Stops non-essential system event logging to reduce continuous disk activity and save CPU cycles.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableCortana.ShortDescription
data.value: Turns off the Cortana voice assistant and removes Bing web results from the Windows Search bar.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableCopilot.ShortDescription
data.value: Removes the AI Copilot assistant from the taskbar and system shell to free up memory and screen space.

data.name: Optimizer.SecurityAndPrivacy.DisableContentDeliveryManager.ShortDescription
data.value: Turns off Windows cloud-delivered content, including system tips, spotlight suggestions, and automatic delivery of consumer features.

data.name: Optimizer.BloatwareAndServices.DisablePreinstalledApps.ShortDescription
data.value: Prevents Windows from automatically re-installing unwanted third-party apps and promoted software.

data.name: Optimizer.BloatwareAndServices.ConfigureServices.ShortDescription
data.value: Adjusts non-essential background services to free up resources while maintaining all necessary Windows functionality.

data.name: Optimizer.UserExperience.SpeedUpExplorerAndMenus.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets StartupDelayInMSec=0, MenuShowDelay=0 to eliminate Explorer startup delay and reduce menu hover delay to minimum.

data.name: Optimizer.UserExperience.DisableVisualEffects.ShortDescription
data.value: Disables taskbar animations, listview shadows, window transparency, and Aero Peek to free up GPU/CPU resources for better performance.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.AmdDisableUlps.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets EnableULPS=0 in AMD GPU registry to prevent Ultra Low Power State wake-up delays and multi-monitor issues. Reduces power saving on idle.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.AmdDisablePowerGating.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets DisablePowerGating=1, PP_GPUPowerDownEnabled=0, DisableDynamicPstate=1 to prevent AMD GPU power state transitions. Maintains consistent clocks at cost of higher idle power.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.AmdDisableVideoClockGating.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets DisableVCEPowerGating=1, DisableVceClockGating=1, EnableUvdClockGating=0 for AMD video engines (VCE/UVD) to improve encode/decode stability. Increases video playback power.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.AmdDisableAspm.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets EnableAspmL0s=0, EnableAspmL1=0 to disable Active State Power Management on AMD GPUs, reducing PCIe bus latency. Increases slot power consumption.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.NvidiaDisableDynamicPstate.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets DisableDynamicPstate=1 to lock NVIDIA GPU into fixed performance state, preventing clock speed fluctuations. Increases idle power draw.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.NvidiaDisableAsyncPstates.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets DisableASyncPstates=1 to prevent NVIDIA asynchronous power state switching, providing deterministic performance for VR/real-time apps.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.IntelDisableAsyncFlips.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets Display1_DisableAsyncFlips=1 to force synchronous buffer flips on Intel iGPU, reducing input-to-display latency and screen tearing.

data.name: Optimizer.Gpu.IntelDisableAdaptiveVsync.ShortDescription
data.value: Sets AdaptiveVsyncEnable=0 to disable Intel's adaptive V-Sync that dynamically adjusts to frame rate, using fixed V-Sync instead for stable timing.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarNewsAndInterests.Description
data.value: Controls the News and Interests widget on the taskbar and MSN feed background updates.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarSearchBox.Description
data.value: Controls visibility of the search box on the taskbar.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarChatButton.Description
data.value: Controls visibility of the Chat (Teams) button on the taskbar.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarWidgets.Description
data.value: Controls visibility of the Widgets button on the taskbar.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarAlignment.Description
data.value: Switches taskbar alignment between Center (default) and Left.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ExplorerCompactMode.Description
data.value: Decreases spacing between items in File Explorer for a denser view.

data.name: Features.Preferences.SnapAssistFlyout.Description
data.value: Controls the snap layouts menu that appears when hovering over the maximize button.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ExplorerItemCheckboxes.Description
data.value: Shows check boxes when selecting items in File Explorer.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarTaskViewButton.Description
data.value: Controls visibility of the Task View button on the taskbar.

data.name: Features.Preferences.MeetNow.Description
data.value: Controls the Meet Now (Skype) icon in the taskbar notification area.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarPeople.Description
data.value: Controls the People icon on the taskbar for quick contacts access.

data.name: Features.Preferences.TaskbarEndTask.Description
data.value: Adds an "End task" option to the taskbar right-click menu for quick process termination.

data.name: Features.Preferences.DarkMode.Description
data.value: Enables dark mode for system apps, Settings, and shell elements.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ExplorerSyncNotifications.Description
data.value: Controls OneDrive and cloud sync provider notifications in File Explorer.

data.name: Features.Preferences.SystemSuggestions.Description
data.value: Controls Windows tips and app suggestions in the Settings panel.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ToastNotifications.Description
data.value: Controls toast popup notifications and lock screen notifications.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ShowFileExtensions.Description
data.value: Shows file extensions (e.g. .txt, .exe) in File Explorer.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ShowHiddenFiles.Description
data.value: Shows hidden files and folders in File Explorer.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ClipboardHistory.Description
data.value: Keep multiple copied items so you can paste them later with Win+V.

data.name: Features.Preferences.WindowShake.Description
data.value: Shake a window to minimize all other open windows.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ClassicContextMenu.Description
data.value: Restores Windows 10-style full context menu on Windows 11.

data.name: Features.Preferences.ShowSecondsInSystemClock.Description
data.value: Displays seconds in the taskbar clock for precise time monitoring.

data.name: Features.Gaming.GameMode.Description
data.value: Prioritizes game processes and prevents interruptions from Windows Update while gaming.

data.name: Features.Gaming.GameBar.Description
data.value: Controls Xbox Game Bar overlays, startup panel, and related background features.

data.name: Features.Gaming.BackgroundRecording.Description
data.value: Controls automatic background game recording (Game DVR) and app capture.

data.name: Features.Gaming.MouseAcceleration.Description
data.value: Enables or disables Windows mouse acceleration for more consistent cursor movement.

data.name: Features.Gaming.FullscreenOptimizations.Description
data.value: Controls Windows DWM-based full-screen optimizations that may cause input lag or forced borderless windowed mode.

data.name: Features.Gaming.HardwareAcceleratedGpuScheduling.Description
data.value: Lets the GPU manage its own video memory scheduling directly, reducing CPU overhead and display latency. Requires a compatible GPU driver.

data.name: Settings.Optimize.ShellTimeout.Warning
data.value: Do NOT change unless you know exactly what you are doing

data.name: Optimizer.PowerManagement.InstallOptimizerDuckPowerPlan.Error.DownloadFailed
data.value: Failed to download optimizerDuck's power plan.

data.name: Settings.About.Acknowledgements.Description
data.value: optimizerDuck is made possible by the following open-source software and resources.

data.name: RestorePointDialog.Description
data.value: Restore Point allows you to revert your system to a previous state. It's a safety measure to protect your Windows before applying changes.

data.name: RestorePointDialog.Help
data.value: The application will automatically enable System Restore and create a checkpoint named "optimizerDuck...". This ensures you can always go back if anything goes wrong.

data.name: RestorePoint.Snackbar.Error.Title
data.value: Unable to create or enable System Restore.

data.name: RestorePoint.Snackbar.Error.Message
data.value: An error occurred while creating or enabling System Restore. Please try creating it manually.

data.name: RestorePoint.Snackbar.Warning.LimitReached
data.value: A restore point has already been created within the past 24 hours.

data.name: RestorePoint.Progress.Retrying
data.value: Retrying to create the restore point...

data.name: RestorePoint.Snackbar.Success.Message
data.value: A restore point has been created with the name: {0}.

data.name: Snackbar.OpenLinkFailed.Message
data.value: An error occurred while opening the path. Please check the log.

data.name: Snackbar.OpenFailed.Message
data.value: An error occurred while opening the folder or file. Please check the log.

data.name: Snackbar.OpenFailed.Title
data.value: Unable to open the folder or file

data.name: Bloatware.Empty.Description
data.value: optimizerDuck didn't find any removable AppX packages. It's empty as a void...

data.name: Bloatware.Loading.Hint
data.value: This may take a moment while the application scans for installed packages.

data.name: BloatwareDialog.Confirmation.Description
data.value: Review the selected apps before removal. Proceed only if you are sure.

data.name: Settings.Bloatware.RemoveProvisioned.Description
data.value: When removing installed AppX packages, also remove the corresponding Provisioned packages to prevent automatic reinstallation for new users.

data.name: Dashboard.UpdateInfoBar.Message
data.value: optimizerDuck (v{0}) is available! Update now to enjoy the latest features, improvements, and bug fixes.

data.name: Bloatware.Search.NoResults
data.value: No results found. Try a different search term or filter.

data.name: DiskCleanup.Header.Description
data.value: Free up disk space by removing temporary files and cache

data.name: DiskCleanup.Complete.Message
data.value: Successfully freed {0} of disk space in {1}

data.name: DiskCleanup.Error.Message
data.value: Some files could not be deleted. They may be in use by another process.

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.TempFiles.Description
data.value: User temporary files created by applications (excluding the .net temp directory)

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.WindowsUpdate.Description
data.value: Downloaded Windows Update files that are no longer needed

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.Prefetch.Description
data.value: Application prefetch data used to speed up loading

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.Thumbnails.Description
data.value: Cached thumbnail images for Explorer file previews

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.RecycleBin.Description
data.value: Deleted files still stored in the Recycle Bin

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.ErrorReports.Description
data.value: Windows error reports and crash dump files

data.name: DiskCleanup.Item.OldWindowsInstallation.Description
data.value: Previous Windows installation files kept after a major update or upgrade

data.name: Bloatware.Header.Description
data.value: Manage and remove pre-installed applications that you don't need

data.name: StartupManager.Header.Description
data.value: Manage applications and tasks that run automatically when Windows starts.

data.name: OptimizationDetailsDialog.Other.OpenRevertFile.Description
data.value: Open the raw json file containing revert data for this optimization.

data.name: OptimizationDetailsDialog.Other.ViewSource.Description
data.value: Open the source code for this optimization in your browser.

data.name: StartupManager.Apps.Description
data.value: Applications that run automatically when Windows starts.

data.name: StartupManager.Tasks.Description
data.value: Windows tasks configured to run at logon or on a schedule.

data.name: StartupManager.Loading.Hint
data.value: This may take a moment while the application scans the registry and startup folders.

data.name: StartupManager.Empty.Description
data.value: No startup applications or scheduled tasks were found on this system.

data.name: ScheduledTasks.Header.Description
data.value: View and manage Windows scheduled tasks.

data.name: ScheduledTasks.Loading.Hint
data.value: This may take a moment while scanning for all scheduled tasks on your system...

data.name: ScheduledTasks.Dialog.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the task "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings.About.NeedHelp.Description
data.value: If you need help with optimization or have any questions, please join our community for quick support.

data.name: Settings.Optimize.ShowCompletionNotification.Description
data.value: Displays a notification when optimizations have been successfully applied or reverted.

data.name: Features.SystemFeatures.Description
data.value: Optimize core system features and behaviors

data.name: Features.SystemFeatures.EnableNumLockOnBoot.Description
data.value: Turn NumLock on or off at the Windows login screen

data.name: Features.Desktop.Description
data.value: Manage desktop icons and shortcut behaviors

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowThisPc.Description
data.value: Display the This PC icon on your desktop

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowRecycleBin.Description
data.value: Display the Recycle Bin icon on your desktop

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowUserFiles.Description
data.value: Display your user profile folder as a desktop icon

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowNetwork.Description
data.value: Display the Network icon on your desktop

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowControlPanel.Description
data.value: Display the Control Panel icon on your desktop

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShowDesktopIcons.Description
data.value: Show or hide all desktop icons at once

data.name: Features.Desktop.ShortcutArrow.Description
data.value: Show or hide the shortcut arrow overlay on desktop icons

data.name: Features.Preferences.LaunchToThisPc.Description
data.value: Open File Explorer to This PC instead of Quick Access

data.name: Features.Preferences.BingSearch.Description
data.value: Show or hide Bing web results and suggestions in Windows Search

data.name: LegalDialog.Intro.Safety
data.value: To ensure transparency and your safety, optimizerDuck may adjust certain system settings and registry configurations.

data.name: LegalDialog.Intro.Review
data.value: Please take a moment to review the following documents. By continuing, you agree to these terms.

data.name: LegalDialog.Warning.Message
data.value: We recommend creating a backup before applying any changes.

data.name: Dialog.PendingChanges.Content
data.value: Some changes require a restart to take effect. What would you like to do before exiting?

data.name: Settings.About.Documentation.Description
data.value: View documentation, usage guides, and FAQs.
